instruction:
Please perform a clay render style conversion based on the uploaded image.
Strictly preserve the original composition, perspective, camera angle, subject proportions, and subject placement as closely as possible. Do not add or remove unrelated objects.
Convert the entire image into a monochromatic matte neutral grey clay render with clean white background, soft studio lighting, strong AO, and pronounced contact shadows. Remove all textures, colors, material properties, text, logos, prints, and graphic details. These must not appear as embossed or engraved geometry.
For human or humanoid subjects, preserve identity and lock the key facial features exactly. Do not redesign, beautify, stylize, idealize, exaggerate, or alter the person's recognizable traits. Keep the original eye size, eye shape, eye spacing, eyelid shape, eyebrow shape, nose shape, mouth shape, lip thickness, jawline, cheek contour, facial proportions, and overall head shape consistent with the source image. Any cleanup or completion must be identity-preserving and feature-preserving.
Simplify messy hair, beard, fur, and flyaway strands into clean sculptable masses while preserving the original hairstyle, hairline, silhouette, volume, and characteristic shape. Do not change the hairstyle design or overall hair proportion.
If the face or head is cropped, truncated, partially missing, or incomplete, complete it naturally into a full coherent head/face consistent with the visible regions and the original identity. Completion must be conservative and should not invent new facial traits.
Eyes must contain complete spherical eyeballs. Do not create hollow sockets, concave pupils, or carved eye cavities. Preserve the original eye size and shape exactly; only replace hollow or dented interpretation with proper eyeball volume.
Favor clean, stable, watertight-looking sculptural forms with readable anatomy and smooth surfaces suitable for downstream 3D modeling, while keeping all defining character features unchanged.
instruction_cn:
请基于上传的图像执行灰模渲染风格转换。
严格保留原图的构图、透视、相机角度、主体比例与主体位置，尽可能不发生任何位移。不要新增或删除任何无关物体。
将整张图转换为单色、哑光、中性灰的灰模渲染，配以干净的白色背景、柔和的工作室光照、强烈的环境光遮蔽（AO）以及明显的接触阴影。去除所有纹理、颜色、材质特性、文字、Logo、印花与图形细节，且这些元素不得以浮雕或凹刻几何的形式残留。
对于人物或拟人化主体，必须保留身份并严格锁定关键面部特征。不要重新设计、美化、风格化、理想化、夸张化或改变人物的辨识特征。眼睛大小、眼形、眼距、眼睑形状、眉毛形状、鼻型、嘴型、唇厚、下颌线、脸颊轮廓、面部比例、整体头型，必须与原图保持一致。任何修补或补全都必须遵循身份保持与特征保持的原则。
将凌乱的头发、胡须、毛发与碎发简化为干净、可雕刻的整体块面，同时保留原始发型、发际线、剪影、体积感和典型形状。不要更改发型设计或整体头发比例。
若面部或头部有裁切、截断、部分缺失或不完整，请在可见区域与原始身份保持一致的前提下，自然地补全为完整连贯的头部/面部。补全必须保守，不得编造新的面部特征。
眼睛必须为完整的球形眼球。不要做成空洞眼眶、凹陷瞳孔或挖空的眼部腔体。严格保留原始眼睛的大小与形状，仅将空洞或凹陷的解读替换为合理的眼球体积。
偏向干净、稳定、看起来水密（watertight）的雕塑感形态，具有可读的解剖结构与平滑表面，适合下游 3D 建模流程；同时保留所有定义性角色特征不变。

严格保留原图的构图、透视、相机角度、主体比例与主体位置，尽可能不发生任何位移。不要新增或删除任何无关物体。
将整张图转换为单色、哑光、中性灰的灰模渲染，配以干净的白色背景、柔和的工作室光照、强烈的环境光遮蔽（AO）以及明显的接触阴影。去除所有纹理、颜色、材质特性、文字、Logo、印花与图形细节，且这些元素不得以浮雕或凹刻几何的形式残留。
对于人物或拟人化主体，必须保留身份并严格锁定关键面部特征。不要重新设计、美化、风格化、理想化、夸张化或改变人物的辨识特征。眼睛大小、眼形、眼距、眼睑形状、眉毛形状、鼻型、嘴型、唇厚、下颌线、脸颊轮廓、面部比例、整体头型，必须与原图保持一致。任何修补或补全都必须遵循身份保持与特征保持的原则。
将凌乱的头发、胡须、毛发与碎发简化为干净、可雕刻的整体块面，同时保留原始发型、发际线、剪影、体积感和典型形状。不要更改发型设计或整体头发比例。
若面部或头部有裁切、截断、部分缺失或不完整，请在可见区域与原始身份保持一致的前提下，自然地补全为完整连贯的头部/面部。补全必须保守，不得编造新的面部特征。
眼睛必须为完整的球形眼球。不要做成空洞眼眶、凹陷瞳孔或挖空的眼部腔体。严格保留原始眼睛的大小与形状，仅将空洞或凹陷的解读替换为合理的眼球体积。
偏向干净、稳定、看起来水密（watertight）的雕塑感形态，具有可读的解剖结构与平滑表面，适合下游 3D 建模流程；同时保留所有定义性角色特征不变。

instruction:
Please perform a clay render style conversion based on the uploaded image.
Strictly preserve the original composition, perspective, camera angle, subject proportions, and subject placement as closely as possible. Do not add or remove unrelated objects.
Convert the entire image into a monochromatic matte neutral grey clay render with clean white background, soft studio lighting, strong AO, and pronounced contact shadows. Remove all textures, colors, material properties, text, logos, prints, and graphic details. These must not appear as embossed or engraved geometry.
For human or humanoid subjects, preserve identity and lock the key facial features exactly. Do not redesign, beautify, stylize, idealize, exaggerate, or alter the person's recognizable traits. Keep the original eye size, eye shape, eye spacing, eyelid shape, eyebrow shape, nose shape, mouth shape, lip thickness, jawline, cheek contour, facial proportions, and overall head shape consistent with the source image. Any cleanup or completion must be identity-preserving and feature-preserving.
Simplify messy hair, beard, fur, and flyaway strands into clean sculptable masses while preserving the original hairstyle, hairline, silhouette, volume, and characteristic shape. Do not change the hairstyle design or overall hair proportion.
If the face or head is cropped, truncated, partially missing, or incomplete, complete it naturally into a full coherent head/face consistent with the visible regions and the original identity. Completion must be conservative and should not invent new facial traits.
Eyes must contain complete spherical eyeballs. Do not create hollow sockets, concave pupils, or carved eye cavities. Preserve the original eye size and shape exactly; only replace hollow or dented interpretation with proper eyeball volume.
Favor clean, stable, watertight-looking sculptural forms with readable anatomy and smooth surfaces suitable for downstream 3D modeling, while keeping all defining character features unchanged.

将凌乱的头发、胡须、毛发与碎发简化为干净、可雕刻的整体块面，同时保留原始发型、发际线、剪影、体积感和典型形状。不要更改发型设计或整体头发比例。
若面部或头部有裁切、截断、部分缺失或不完整，请在可见区域与原始身份保持一致的前提下，自然地补全为完整连贯的头部/面部。补全必须保守，不得编造新的面部特征。
眼睛必须为完整的球形眼球。不要做成空洞眼眶、凹陷瞳孔或挖空的眼部腔体。严格保留原始眼睛的大小与形状，仅将空洞或凹陷的解读替换为合理的眼球体积。
偏向干净、稳定、看起来水密（watertight）的雕塑感形态，具有可读的解剖结构与平滑表面，适合下游 3D 建模流程；同时保留所有定义性角色特征不变。

instruction:
Please perform a clay render style conversion based on the uploaded image.
Strictly preserve the original composition, perspective, camera angle, subject proportions, and subject placement as closely as possible. Do not add or remove unrelated objects.
Convert the entire image into a monochromatic matte neutral grey clay render with clean white background, soft studio lighting, strong AO, and pronounced contact shadows. Remove all textures, colors, material properties, text, logos, prints, and graphic details. These must not appear as embossed or engraved geometry.
For human or humanoid subjects, preserve identity and lock the key facial features exactly. Do not redesign, beautify, stylize, idealize, exaggerate, or alter the person's recognizable traits. Keep the original eye size, eye shape, eye spacing, eyelid shape, eyebrow shape, nose shape, mouth shape, lip thickness, jawline, cheek contour, facial proportions, and overall head shape consistent with the source image. Any cleanup or completion must be identity-preserving and feature-preserving.
Simplify messy hair, beard, fur, and flyaway strands into clean sculptable masses while preserving the original hairstyle, hairline, silhouette, volume, and characteristic shape. Do not change the hairstyle design or overall hair proportion.
If the face or head is cropped, truncated, partially missing, or incomplete, complete it naturally into a full coherent head/face consistent with the visible regions and the original identity. Completion must be conservative and should not invent new facial traits.
Eyes must contain complete spherical eyeballs. Do not create hollow sockets, concave pupils, or carved eye cavities. Preserve the original eye size and shape exactly; only replace hollow or dented interpretation with proper eyeball volume.
Favor clean, stable, watertight-looking sculptural forms with readable anatomy and smooth surfaces suitable for downstream 3D modeling, while keeping all defining character features unchanged.
